statement.text: One agent. Every output, beautifully connected.

props.markdown:
## Welcome

This is the **agent output hub** — a living index of every report this agent has produced.

Click any card below to open the full report. New outputs are added automatically at the top as the agent runs.

history.title: Week 18 Team Update
history.description: Engineering & Product weekly sync. Enterprise tier live, mobile alpha in progress, 4 action items.

history.title: April 2026 Growth Report
history.description: MAU up 178% MoM to 41 200. ARR crossed $1 M. Channel breakdown and retention cohort analysis.

history.title: Q1 2026 Product Launch Report
history.description: Falcon Platform post-launch analysis. 14 820 day-1 sign-ups, 68% activation rate, #1 Product Hunt.
